title: Transport, Cities, and Urban Solutions Game Zone
source: Generated from approved unit runtime and linked master dictionary

games.title: Meaning Match
games.description: Match each unit word to its approved child-friendly meaning.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: A feeling of sadness or being unhappy for a long time.
choices: melancholy
elated
famished
rounds.answer: melancholy
rounds.explanation: melancholy: A feeling of sadness or being unhappy for a long time.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Not strict or careful; relaxed.
choices: melancholy
elated
lax
rounds.answer: lax
rounds.explanation: lax: Not strict or careful; relaxed.

rounds.prompt: Which word means: Having a lot of knowledge or experience; complex and advanced.
choices: elated
sophisticated
melancholy
rounds.answer: sophisticated
rounds.explanation: sophisticated: Having a lot of knowledge or experience; complex and advanced.

games.title: Spelling Builder
games.description: Choose letter tiles to build important unit words.

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Full of energy, excitement, and happiness.
rounds.answer: exuberant

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: To make someone want to do something, especially something that is not good for them.
rounds.answer: tempt

rounds.prompt: Build the word that matches the clue.
rounds.clue: Not straight or level; tilted to one side.
rounds.answer: askew

games.title: Sentence Puzzle
games.description: Put unit words into the correct sentence order.

rounds.answer: She was wary of walking alone in the dark.
The beauty of the sunset was ephemeral, disappearing within minutes.
The mountain looked formidable, and I was nervous about climbing it.

games.title: Language Choice
games.description: Choose the form that makes the unit language accurate.

choices: Feeling satisfied with yourself and not wanting to improve or change.
Not strict or careful; relaxed.
The ability to control yourself and make yourself do things you should, even if you do not want to.
To make someone want to do something, especially something that is not good for them.
rounds.answer: Feeling satisfied with yourself and not wanting to improve or change.
rounds.explanation: After getting a good grade on the test, he became complacent and stopped studying.

choices: Not aware of something that is happening around you.
Not strict or careful; relaxed.
To make someone want to do something, especially something that is not good for them.
Very unpleasant or rude; something that annoys people.
rounds.answer: Very unpleasant or rude; something that annoys people.
rounds.explanation: The obnoxious noise from the party kept me awake all night.

choices: Not aware of something that is happening around you.
Not having much experience or knowledge about the world, and therefore easily deceived.
Not strict or careful; relaxed.
The ability to control yourself and make yourself do things you should, even if you do not want to.
rounds.answer: The ability to control yourself and make yourself do things you should, even if you do not want to.
rounds.explanation: Studying every day requires a lot of discipline, but it helps me get good grades.

games.title: Speaking Quest
games.description: Listen, record, review and submit useful unit language.

rounds.target: She was wary of walking alone in the dark.
The beauty of the sunset was ephemeral, disappearing within minutes.
Explain one important unit idea, give a reason with because, and respond to two follow-up questions.

games.title: Word Order Race
games.description: Arrange unit language in a clear, accurate order.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The new smartphone has many sophisticated features.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: Many contemporary artists use new technology in their work.

rounds.prompt: Put this unit sentence in order.
rounds.answer: The temperature can fluctuate a lot during the day.

games.title: Definition Dash
games.description: Choose the approved meaning before moving to the next clue.

rounds.prompt: What does 'naive' mean in this unit?
choices: Not having much experience or knowledge about the world, and therefore easily deceived.
A feeling of sadness or being unhappy for a long time.
Very happy and excited about something good that has happened.
rounds.answer: Not having much experience or knowledge about the world, and therefore easily deceived.
rounds.explanation: naive: Not having much experience or knowledge about the world, and therefore easily deceived.

rounds.prompt: What does 'contemporary' mean in this unit?
choices: A feeling of sadness or being unhappy for a long time.
Very happy and excited about something good that has happened.
Living or happening at the same time; modern.
rounds.answer: Living or happening at the same time; modern.
rounds.explanation: contemporary: Living or happening at the same time; modern.

rounds.prompt: What does 'elated' mean in this unit?
choices: Very hungry or starving.
Very happy and excited about something good that has happened.
A feeling of sadness or being unhappy for a long time.
rounds.answer: Very happy and excited about something good that has happened.
rounds.explanation: elated: Very happy and excited about something good that has happened.

games.title: Question Quest
games.description: Read each unit question carefully and choose the best answer.

choices: Able to be easily hurt or harmed, either physically or emotionally.
Feeling satisfied with yourself and not wanting to improve or change.
Very hungry or starving.
Very unpleasant or rude; something that annoys people.
rounds.answer: Able to be easily hurt or harmed, either physically or emotionally.
rounds.explanation: The little bird was vulnerable because it had just fallen from its nest.

Feeling satisfied with yourself and not wanting to improve or change.

choices: The ability to control yourself and make yourself do things you should, even if you do not want to.
To make someone want to do something, especially something that is not good for them.
Very hungry or starving.

rounds.answer: Very hungry or starving.
